caption: A scene viewed through night-vision goggles shows military personnel in a green-tinted outdoor setting at night. A person in camouflage gear and a helmet stands centrally, facing away from the viewer and gesturing with their left arm toward another individual. This second person, also in camouflage and a helmet, stands to the right. Both individuals are equipped with tactical vests and gear. In the background, a fence line and a bright light source are visible. Throughout the sequence, the central figure continues to gesture and shift their position slightly while communicating with the other soldier. A small, blue pentagonal icon is present in the bottom right corner of each view. The lighting remains consistent, creating high contrast between the dark surroundings and the bright green night-vision glow.
